Video.summary: A woman finds romance with her fiancee's twin sister; a man turns to another woman for attention; a man tells the mother of his child that he wants to be with someone else.
Video.title: Lesbian Twin Love Triangle

Video.summary: Are you looking for fast cash but feel you don't have the skills well our guests today have started a family business…they're selling sex and they're ready to reveal their secrets!
Video.title: The Hooker Family Hour

Video.summary: Brandie is a 16 year old sex addict who claims to have slept with over 200 men. Steve enlists the help of Marvelyn, a woman who contracted HIV at the age of 19. Then, Shantaysia is 19 years old and works as a prostitute.
Video.title: Teen Sex and Prostitution

Video.summary: Insecure Star likes Deandre, but he prefers her stripper cousin; Dominic has a confession to make to his girlfriend; Kristin cheats with her husband's teenage nephew.
Video.title: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Image.alt: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Video.summary: Wanda thinks Jason has been visiting the pancake house for more than pancakes! Carl’s fling Melanie has a big secret about his sister’s man! Dave’s girlfriend Shannon has been sleeping with a stripper!
Video.title: Short Stack Smackdown

Video.summary: Taylor's fiance reveals the truth; Falin wants her engaged friend to know that she has been hooking up with her man; Yashisca's fiance wants to get all of his skeletons out of the closet before taking a trip down the aisle.
Video.title: Bossy Brides

Video.summary: Nick's girlfriend finds out why he spends so much time with their neighbor; Osha's boyfriend scored with his female friend; Brandi resents her boyfriend's reckless behavior after all of the sacrifices she has made to keep their relationship.
Video.title: Clingy Chicks

Video.summary: Priscilla's boyfriend admits to cheating but blames her and her pregnancy for his behavior; Santana says he is willing to change, but his actions may be too little, too late; Scoota wants the benefits of a relationship without the attachment.
Video.title: I Cheated Because You're Pregnant

Video.summary: Two men confess to cheating on their girlfriends and Michelle wants to tell her boyfriend she has a mistress.
Video.title: Cheating Secrets Revealed

Video.summary: Heaven and her daughters have been prostitutes. Angry family members try to talk these women away from him!
Video.title: My Pimp Runs My Family

Video.summary: Salina's sister Jessica is sleeping with her fiancé! Courtney and Danika fight for the love of one man!
Video.title: Hot-headed Hotties!

Video.summary: Trey thinks Queshia slept with his father Nate and Nate could be the father of their baby.
Video.title: DNA: Did My Wife Cheat With My Dad?

Image.alt: DNA: Did My Wife Cheat With My Dad?
DNA: Did My Wife Cheat With My Dad?
DNA: Did My Wife Cheat With My Dad?

Video.summary: Khadisa thinks her boyfriend is cheating with her sister. He admits to cheating in the past, but not now.
Video.title: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

Image.alt: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

Video.summary: Elisha is claiming to be pregnant with John's baby, but Elisha's friend Brittany claims that she made up the pregnancy to keep John from breaking up with her. Then, during her pregnancy, Linzy contracted an STD and believes that Alex gave it to her.
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Video.summary: Eric finally won custody of her daughter and suspects his ex Brittney of neglecting her! He suspects Brittney’s boyfriend Freddy of molesting her and knows that his daughter tested positive for meth! But what will the lie detector results reveal?
Video.title: This Child Was Living in Hell

Image.alt: This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell

Video.summary: Taking a stand! After years of abuse and living in fear, Kristen finally thought she found the strength to leave her abusive relationship with Terrell behind. He openly admits to abusing Kristen and taking his rage out on her, but thinks he can change for the better. Changing a bad habit is never easy, but Steve may be the last hope this family has.
Video.title: You Won't Beat Me Again

Video.summary: Katrina says she was molested by her step-father as a child. Katrina says that when she told her mother Phyllis, she not only forgave him, but stayed with himI And there's more... Katrina says after telling Phyllis, he continued to molest her!
Video.title: A Family Ripped Apart

Video.summary: Debbie is concerned that her daughter, Heather, is so preoccupied with breaking up her relationship, that she is neglecting her children. Plus, Stephen is here because he's concerned that his daughters are being abused by his ex-wife's boyfriend.
Video.title: Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Image.alt: Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Video.summary: Katrina is fed up with her boyfriend Ismael's abusive and controlling ways. Katrina says Ismael acts this way because he believes she has been cheating. Then, Christie has been married to Chris for 8 months and he already suspects her infidelity.
Video.title: Accusers Turned Abusers

Video.summary: Davonna believes that her husband Michael never abused her son. Her son told his dad Brandon that Michael punched him in the nose and back. Then, Evie wants to prove that she never abused her son and deserves custody of him from her mother!
Video.title: My Son Said You Beat Him

Image.alt: My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: Wives reveal their controlling husbands and confront the lifestyle issues that have been forced upon on them.
Video.title: He Controls Me!

Video.summary: Connie is upset with her daughter Amber who dropped out of college to become a model.
Video.title: Ivy League Stripper

Video.summary: Frantic mothers address their teenage daughters about abusing family members and committing crimes.
Video.title: I'm Frantic About My Teen!

Video.summary: Sally invites old high school sweethearts who haven't spoken in decades to see if they can rekindle the flame.
Video.title: I Was a Nerd... Now I'm A Knockout!

Image.alt: I Was a Nerd... Now I'm A Knockout!
I Was a Nerd... Now I'm A Knockout!
I Was a Nerd... Now I'm A Knockout!

Video.summary: This couple says they were scammed by a woman who promised them her twin babies, but was she ever pregnant?
Video.title: Like Taking Candy

Video.summary: These kids give their mom the ultimate proposition - him or me?
Video.title: You Have to Chose

Video.summary: Do you know what its like to go to the Boy Scouts and have them ask you where your father is?
Video.title: Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!

Image.alt: Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!
Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!
Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!

Video.summary: Actresses and Models appear on the show to express how the paparazzi and tabloids interfered with lies that affected their professional caress and personal lives.
Video.title: Tabloid Lies

Video.summary: After paternity tests revealed their real fathers, children return to the show to confront them once because they continue to refuse to be a part of their lives.
Video.title: Pay for Your Son

Video.summary: Teen girls confront their boyfriends about their abusive behavior in an attempt to end it.
Video.title: Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?

Image.alt: Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?
Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?
Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?

Video.summary: Can Sally help these couples salvage their families? She calls in the experts to find out.
Video.title: Couples On The Verge of Divorce

Image.alt: Couples On The Verge of Divorce
Couples On The Verge of Divorce
Couples On The Verge of Divorce
